faq.label: FAQ's
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: We offer comprehensive cleaning across Riyadh. Our standard clean covers dusting, mopping, vacuuming, and wiping down all surfaces in your bedrooms, bathrooms, kitchen, and living areas. For deeper needs, we offer deep-cleaning and move-in/out services.
faq.q2: How do I book a cleaning service?
faq.a2: Simply select your district in Riyadh (e.g., Al Olaya, Hittin, Al Malqa) from our header, choose your service type, and see your instant pricing. You can book an appointment entirely online in under 60 seconds.
faq.q3: Can I book a recurring service?
faq.a3: Yes! While checking out, you can schedule weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly cleaning sessions. Recurring customers often receive priority booking and special rates.
faq.q4: How can I trust your professionals?
faq.a4: Every cleaner at Velro undergoes a rigorous background check, professional training, and continuous evaluation. We're trusted by thousands of homes in Riyadh and back our work with a 100% Satisfaction Guarantee.
faq.a5: Our standard pricing starts around 50 SAR per hour. Final pricing depends heavily on your apartment/villa size and selected add-ons. We provide exact, transparent, upfront quotes before you book — no hidden fees.
faq.q6: Do I need to provide cleaning supplies?
faq.a6: No, our professionals come fully equipped with high-quality, safe cleaning materials to ensure your home is spotless.
faq.q7: Where in Riyadh do you operate?
faq.a7: We cover almost all major neighborhoods in Riyadh, including North Riyadh (Al Malqa, Al Yasmin, An Narjis), Central (Al Olaya, As Sulimaniyah), and many more.

about.hero_title2: One Spotless Room at a Time
about.hero_subtitle: Velro is Riyadh's most trusted home cleaning service — built on professionalism, care, and the promise that your home deserves the very best.
about.story_heading: We Started with One Simple Belief:
about.story_em: Every Home in Riyadh Deserves to be Spotless
about.story_p1: Velro was born out of a simple but powerful idea — families in Riyadh should be able to come home to a clean, fresh, welcoming space without the stress of doing it themselves.
about.story_p2: We built Velro from the ground up, carefully handpicking and training every single cleaning professional on our team. From day one, we have been committed to transparency, reliability, and results that speak for themselves.
about.story_p3: Today, we proudly serve thousands of homes across Riyadh — from Al Olaya and Hittin to Al Malqa, An Narjis, and beyond. Whether you need a quick standard clean or a comprehensive deep clean, Velro delivers consistent, high-quality results every single time.
about.values_subtitle: These six principles shape how we hire, train, and serve — every single day.
about.promise_title: A Cleaner Home. A Happier You.
about.promise_p1: We know inviting someone into your home requires trust. That's why every Velro professional is background-checked, insured, and trained to the highest standards before they ever set foot in a client's home.
about.promise_p2: We use only premium, eco-friendly cleaning products that are safe for children, pets, and the environment. And if you're ever less than 100% satisfied, we'll return and make it right — free of charge.
about.cta_title: Ready to Experience the Velro Difference?
about.cta_desc: Join over 5,000 happy homeowners across Riyadh. Book your first clean online in under 60 seconds — no phone calls, no hassle.
svc.hero_subtitle: From sparkling homes to pristine commercial spaces, we deliver exceptional cleaning solutions. Our professional team uses eco-friendly products to ensure outstanding results.
svc.residential_subtitle: From quick standard cleans to specialized deep cleans, we keep your home exactly how you love it.
svc.commercial_subtitle: We maintain professional spaces with the highest standard of hygiene and care.
svc.why_subtitle: Professional expertise, eco-friendly practices, and focused customer service.
svc.areas_subtitle: We provide professional cleaning services across top locations in Riyadh with plans to expand further.
svc.cta_desc: Experience the difference that professional expertise, eco-friendly practices, and customer-focused service makes.
